tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows a mildly elevated HbA1c (6.1%), indicating impaired glucose regulation or possible early diabetes. All other parameters, including renal function and electrolytes, are within normal limits except for a slightly low total CO₂ (21.7 mmol/L), which may suggest mild metabolic acidosis or compensation. Recommend clinical correlation and follow-up of glycemic status.

text.div: Provider Organization: Centre Médical et Pédagogique Jacques Arnaud

name.value: Centre Médical et Pédagogique Jacques Arnaud

text.div: Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
